ground_truth.title: Wired, Wireless & Bluetooth Headphones
ground_truth.main_content:
Shop Skullcandy Headphones

For decades, Skullcandy has been a leader in the design and production of stylish, innovative headphones. We make both wired and wireless headphone models in over-ear and on-ear versions. While we're most famous for our Crusher Bass lineup, we offer a full line of Bluetooth headphones for adults and kids, complete with adjustable headbands, comfortable, cushioned earcups and built-in microphones.

Which Skullcandy headphones have the best bass?

If bass is what you're after, then Crusher Bluetooth headphones are the answer. Whether you're looking for the totally immersive active noise canceling of Crusher ANC 2, the budget-friendlier Crusher Evo, or the new Crusher 540 Active, you can't go wrong with the patented Sensory Bass technology in our premium wireless headphones. The Crusher 540 Active offers a refined balance of performance and comfort, delivering massive bass and all-day battery life—perfect for workouts, commutes, and everything in between.

Which Skullcandy headphones have the best noise canceling?

For next-level quiet, go with the Aviator 900 ANC, Skullcandy's most advanced noise-canceling Bluetooth headphones. Powered by a smart 4-mic active noise canceling system, Aviator 900 ANC adapts in real time to block out distractions, so you can lock in and stay focused. Whether you're commuting, traveling, or just vibing, it's premium silence with style.

Which Skullcandy headphones have the best microphones?

Our premium headphones feature Clear Voice Smart Mic, which uses artificial intelligence technology to isolate the speaker's voice and eliminate the background noise. If you're looking for a headphone that makes your voice sound clear and easy to understand, take a closer look at Crusher ANC 2, Aviator 900 ANC and Icon ANC. If your looking for an option with a removable boom mic, Crusher PLYR 720 is your best option.

Which Skullcandy headphones have the best fit?

We focus on comfortable fit with every one of our headset and headphone designs. If you're looking for the ultimate in all-day comfort, you can't beat Icon ANC or Icon 180 on-ear headphones. For amazing over-ear headphone comfort, try Crusher ANC 2 or the Aviator 900 ANC. For kids, our Grom and Grom Wireless headphones are some of the most comfortable on the market.

Which Skullcandy headphones are best for working out?

Whether you're training at the gym or hitting the trail, it's not always safe to block out the world completely. That's where Skullcandy Icon ANC and Crusher 540 Active headphones come in. With adjustable Stay-Aware Mode, you can choose how much of your surroundings you want to hear. Stay alert in public spaces or zone in when it's time to focus. Crusher 540 Active is built for fitness with sweat- and water-resistant materials, breathable ear cushions, and Skullcandy's signature Crusher Bass—turning up the energy so you can power through every workout.

Which Skullcandy headphones are best for kids?

We designed Grom and Grom Wireless headphones from the ground up, specifically for children. They aren't just miniaturized adult headphones. From the child-specific earcups and adjustable headband to the safety-focused limited volume levels and the innovative Share-Audio Port, the Grom family of kids' headphones has everything for your children and your peace of mind.
